outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Poll: Trump's Iran war reaches Iraq- and Vietnam-era disapproval level
outlets.summary: WaPo/ABC/Ipsos poll: most Americans call Iran war a mistake. Trump at 34% approval. 61% disapprove of Iran handling. Only 22% approve cost-of-living performance. Comparable to Iraq War in 2006.

outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump is supposed to get Congress' approval when the Iran war hits 60 days. Lawmakers can't agree when that is
outlets.summary: CNN frames the War Powers confusion as constitutional crisis. Trump admin claims ceasefire 'terminates' hostilities. Legal experts dispute.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Congress faces Iran war deadline as Republicans block war powers vote
outlets.summary: Fox frames Democrats as failing to override Republican war support. Notes Collins breaking ranks but focuses on 47-50 defeat of War Powers resolution. IRGC sidelined Iranian president per Fox reporting.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Israel defense chief warns strikes on Iran could resume soon, signals campaign not over
outlets.summary: Fox highlights Katz warning as sign of resolve. Frames Israel as maintaining deterrence while Trump explores options. Supportive tone toward potential resumed operations.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war updates: Trump doesn't rule out resuming attacks
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera covers Trump being briefed on new military options including Hormuz ground deployments, Isfahan uranium SF raid, and rapid heavy strikes. Also covers Hezbollah record 105 attack waves and Nabatieh strikes.

outlets.name: BBC/Reuters
outlets.headline: Trump approval dips to record low 34% amid Iran war, inflation woes
outlets.summary: Reuters/Ipsos poll: Trump at 34% approval (record low). Only 22% approve of cost-of-living handling. Gas prices, war fatigue, and economic anxiety driving decline.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Katz warns Israel may act soon to eliminate existential threats by Iran
outlets.summary: ToI covers Katz warning alongside Hezbollah's record 105 attack waves. Notes 1 killed in Nahariya, IDF tightens northern restrictions. Netanyahu maintains ceasefire 'could turn on a dime.'

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: 750,000 Israelis Unemployed Amid Wars With Iran, Hezbollah in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Broad unemployment 16.2%; 750,000 Israelis without work as wartime economy strains. Defense ~8% of GDP. Debt-to-GDP projected 70.5% by year end.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: 'A new chapter': Leader says Iran will determine 'new legal rules' in Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: Persian Gulf Day message from Mojtaba Khamenei: 'future without America' in Hormuz, vows to protect nuclear and missile capabilities as 'national assets.' Iran framing US blockade as already defeated.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran has every right to counter US's state-sponsored piracy, terrorism: UN envoy
outlets.summary: Iran's UN envoy frames US naval blockade as 'state-sponsored piracy.' Argues international law gives Iran full right to retaliate. Doubles down on Pezeshkian's 'doomed to fail' message.
